name: school_play_02

input.subject: Invitation: Spring Musical - 'The Wizard of Oz'
input.snippet: You're invited to the Woodside High Spring Musical...
input.body_text:
WOODSIDE HIGH SCHOOL
DRAMA DEPARTMENT PRESENTS

馃幁 THE WIZARD OF OZ 馃幁

鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺怽n
Dear Woodside Families,

You are cordially invited to our Spring Musical production!

SHOW DATES:

Friday, April 3, 2026 - 7:00 PM
Saturday, April 4, 2026 - 2:00 PM (Matinee)
Saturday, April 4, 2026 - 7:00 PM
Sunday, April 5, 2026 - 2:00 PM (Matinee)

LOCATION:
Woodside High Auditorium
150 Education Drive
Woodside, CA 94062

TICKETS:
Adults: $15
Students/Seniors: $10
Children under 5: Free

Purchase online: woodsidedrama.org/tickets
Or at the door (cash/card accepted)

鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺怽n
This production features over 50 talented students!

Doors open 30 minutes before showtime.
Concessions available at intermission.

We hope to see you there!

Mr. Roberts
Drama Department Director
